A win-probability view of 2026 MLB ABS challenges. Total xWPA compares the corrected ABS call to the original umpire call; the inventory-risk proxy is kept separate so the headline stays tied to the call itself.

Hitter Challenges Against

Failed challenges against are opponent hitter challenges that were confirmed. Fooled xWPA credits the catcher or pitcher for the opponent's burned-challenge proxy.
